extension.description: Defines a list of extension objects, each containing optional additional properties and a mandatory name. Use to configure specific extensions for the resource.

resource_type.description: Indicates the type of resource to be managed. This value must match the type required by the provider.

subplan.description: Identifies the subplan associated with the resource. Must match valid subplans defined for the resource type.

tier.description: Specifies the service tier for the resource. This is a required field and must be a valid tier supported by the provider.

timeouts.description: Configures custom timeout durations for create, read, update, and delete operations. Each value must be a valid duration string, e.g., '30m'.
